meta.prompt_summary: Optimized for practical web development, product prototyping support, AI-assisted workflows, and structured project delivery.

headline: Web Developer | React, TypeScript, AI-Assisted Prototyping, Structured Delivery
summary: Web developer and frontend-focused fullstack engineer with production experience in React, TypeScript, Node.js, and MongoDB, building enterprise interfaces and multi-tenant systems with reusable UI patterns and type-safe contracts.

Delivers work through an organized, collaborative workflow that combines GitHub Projects, a custom PMS tool, CI/CD, Jest testing, and AI-assisted scaffolding with Claude Opus, Codex, and Gemini Pro 3.
Brings practical experience translating requirements into responsive web screens, prototypes, and production-ready interfaces across education, hotel management, ERP, and IoT products.

bullets: Developed production-grade frontend interfaces and reusable component libraries using React and TypeScript, establishing shared design patterns and type-safe contracts adopted across 8+ company-wide projects.

Drove sprint delivery across 6+ concurrent platform builds in IoT, LMS, HMS, HRIS, Inventory, and Order Management using GitHub Projects and a custom-built PMS in an Agile environment, accelerating delivery through AI-assisted prototyping and scaffolding with Claude Opus, Codex, and Gemini Pro 3.

Designed backend data models in MongoDB and Prisma that aligned frontend-backend contracts, managed CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions with Firebase deployment, and authored Jest unit and integration tests that reduced post-release bug reports by about 25%.

Integrated smart door locks, switch and outlet relays, and IoT gateways via REST APIs into a centralized React dashboard, enabling real-time device control and monitoring for 50+ connected endpoints with sub-500ms response latency.

Designed and delivered 3 responsive client-facing landing pages including the company's main website using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap, with each page passing cross-browser QA on first review during the 3-month internship.
Collaborated with the development team to implement features following SDLC best practices, gaining foundational experience in Git-based versioning and team delivery workflows.

projects.name: ALMA (Alternative Learning Management App)
projects.subtitle: Multi-tenant LMS
bullets: Architected a multi-tenant LMS serving 3 organizational tenants with role-based access for admins, instructors, and 200+ student accounts, implementing tenant-isolated data schemas and JWT-based authentication.
Built an assessment engine with automatic quiz scoring, grade computation, and analytics dashboards tracking learner performance across courses, reducing manual grading workload for instructors.
Developed attendance tracking and gradebook modules used by 15+ instructors across 40+ classes, enabling real-time class record management and automated academic report generation per tenant.

projects.name: HMS Reservation System
projects.subtitle: Hotel management prototype
bullets: Built a multi-tenant hotel management system enabling organizations to manage rooms, pricing, users, and reservations with tenant-isolated data architecture.
Designed and implemented core booking functionality including room type configuration, dynamic pricing rules, and full reservation lifecycle management from search to checkout.

projects.name: ERP Platform Suite (Uzaro Solutions)
projects.subtitle: Enterprise product modules
bullets: Architected and developed interconnected ERP modules as part of a multi-tenant enterprise platform.
Built an HRIS module covering payroll, time management, onboarding, attendance, and personnel records, handling 6,000+ employee records with role-scoped visibility across tenants.

Developed a GS1-compliant inventory system with barcode and SKU identification, real-time stock tracking, and low-stock alerting, reducing manual stock audit time and enabling automated procurement triggers.

Domain Experience: ERP (HRIS, Inventory/GS1, Order Management, Supply Chain, Project Management)

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
bullets: Algolympics Champion - 1st Place, campus-wide algorithm programming contest (2nd Year).
Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering, Object-Oriented Programming.
